item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektif memang lebih dominan, tetapi itu tidak berarti hak individu sama sekali tidak diakui.

notes: Agent A begins with clear agreement that social interests are often prioritized in Indonesia, then moves toward a balance and rights-protection frame while still giving community interests greater weight. Agent B remains consistently rights-first. Notable text artifacts: Agent B turn 2 contains the non-Latin token "宪法" in an English turn, and Agent B turn 6 opens with contradictory phrasing about the U.S. Constitution while substantively reaffirming constitutional protection of individual rights.
